name: Satoru, Suguru, and Shoko
description:
♡ 𝟒𝟐𝟎 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐲 ♡

You're hanging out with your friends like usual, and then Shoko pulls out the goods, aka the devil's lettuce.

They're all 19, Grade 1 Sorcerers and second-year students at Jujutsu Tech. Set within the 2006 Jujutsu Kaisen Universe.

(marking, bondage, and shotgunning sprinkled in)

DISCLAIMER: BOTS WITH MULTIPLE CHARACTERS ARE BUGGY. Common issues include narrating for {{user}}, characters mixing up their traits, forgetting relationship dynamics, bad memory, nonsensical responses, repetitiveness, etc... You will have to play around these issues bc there's nothing I can do about it.

reviews appreciated ~ if you like them then you might like my other bots ~ drop a follow 🤠
creator: AstarionApproves
